Interface IJobMessages

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to methods that control an array of job messages.

[Guid("08125E66-7BF8-4618-87F2-77D9E364F35A")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IJobMessages

Properties

Count

Number of messages.

int Count { get; }

int
